title: skilClient
description: Bunch of different QoL mods to enhance the the user experience.
body:
What is skilClient?

skilClient is a collection of various different QoL and performance mods to enhance the vanilla experience while also including some additions client-side.

Custom cloaks

Courtesy of Capes and Cloaks+, you can upload a custom cloak which anyone using a Cloaks+ compatible mod (like this pack) can see! If you don't want to make your own, they also have a ton of ready-to-use cloaks! To change your cape, visit their website.

FPS improvements

Thanks to Sodium and various other mods, performance is amazing and it's definitely something you won't have to worry about. Shaders are also supported!

What is this primarily for?

There are so many QoL/FPS improvement modpacks on Modrinth and I'm not saying you should use this over any of those. This modpack is my personal preference in terms of what mods get added and removed. The primary purpose of this modpack is for my private servers, letting people get a pretty well optimised client that they can use on the servers, as well as utilise any extra features I add over there.
